title: angelica angelicifolia
intro: Angelica angelicifolia, also known as Rocky Mountain angelica, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Angelica angelicifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and cramps, and aiding in digestion, making it a valuable herb for treating various ailments. Herbal preparations of Angelica angelicifolia can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
